title: HACCP Deviation Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost impact of a HACCP deviation, including direct losses, rework, waste, and compliance penalties, with confidence-adjusted estimates and actionable recommendations.

inputs.label: Deviation Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate cost multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate cost multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

inputs.label: Affected Batch Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. Used to calculate material loss and rework costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. Used to calculate material loss and rework costs.

inputs.label: Unit Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

inputs.label: Rework Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).

inputs.label: Downtime (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total production downtime caused by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total production downtime caused by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

inputs.label: Hourly Overhead Rate ($/hr)
inputs.businessContext: Burdened overhead cost per hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility costs).

businessContext_i18n.en: Burdened overhead cost per hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility costs).

inputs.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

inputs.label: Base Penalty Amount ($)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. Used only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. Used only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

inputs.label: Recall Cost Included?
inputs.businessContext: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage costs.

inputs.label: Recall Fixed Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed cost associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

inputs.label: Recall Variable Cost per kg ($/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Per-kilogram cost for recall handling (transport, disposal, replacement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Per-kilogram cost for recall handling (transport, disposal, replacement).

inputs.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of input data (0 = low, 1 = high). Used to adjust the final cost estimate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of input data (0 = low, 1 = high). Used to adjust the final cost estimate.

rules.message: Base penalty amount should be zero if regulatory penalty flag is false.
Recall costs should be zero if recall flag is false.
Data confidence must be between 0 and 1.

thresholds.message: Total deviation cost exceeds $100,000. Immediate management review recommended.
Waste cost exceeds $50,000. Investigate root cause and implement corrective actions.
Data confidence is low. Consider collecting more accurate data before finalizing cost estimate.

formulas.label: Material Loss Cost
formulas.description: Cost of raw materials that are scrapped (not reworked).

formulas.label: Rework Cost
formulas.description: Additional cost to rework the salvageable portion of the batch.

formulas.label: Downtime Cost
formulas.description: Lost production opportunity cost due to downtime.

formulas.label: Recall Cost
formulas.description: Total recall cost (fixed + variable per kg).

formulas.label: Waste Cost
formulas.description: Total cost of scrapped material (material loss + disposal).

formulas.label: Total Deviation Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Sum of all direct and indirect costs from the deviation.

primary.label: Total Deviation Cost
primary.description: Aggregate financial impact of the HACCP deviation.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Brand Damage Multiplier
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated factor for long-term brand reputation loss (not included in primary cost).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Customer Compensation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Potential compensation to affected customers (not included in primary cost).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Increased Inspection Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional QA/QC inspection costs post-deviation (not included in primary cost).

suggestedActions.label: Perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA)
suggestedActions.description: Conduct a formal RCA using 5-Why or Fishbone to prevent recurrence.

suggestedActions.label: Update HACCP Plan
suggestedActions.description: Revise critical control points (CCPs) and monitoring procedures based on findings.

suggestedActions.label: Retrain Personnel
suggestedActions.description: Provide refresher training on HACCP principles and deviation handling.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA)
suggestedActions.description: Document and track CAPA to ensure effectiveness.

suggestedActions.label: Notify Regulatory Authorities if Required
suggestedActions.description: Comply with reporting obligations (e.g., FDA, USDA) to avoid further penalties.
